name: user-profiles
description: User profiles — bio, display name, email, password change, avatar upload, and session management (remote logout)

requiresContract.softLibrary: @/lib/uploadPaths exports getAvatarsDir() — comes from file-upload-storage. Or write a simple inline version: () => path.join(process.env.DATA_DIR || './data', 'avatars')

postInstall: 1. Run DB migration (ignore 'duplicate column'): sqlite3 data/app.db < db/migrations/005_user_profiles.sql
2. Create lib/uploadPaths.ts if it doesn't exist (see README) — alternatively install the file-upload-storage module
3. Client — fetch /api/users/me for the current profile, PATCH to update
